name: podcast-helper
summary: Podcast Helper — universal audio stream consumer exposed as library, argparse CLI, click CLI, FastAPI HTTP surface and MCP tools. URL-in → PCM-out for local files, direct audio URLs, RSS feed enclosures, and yt-dlp-supported sources (YouTube, Vimeo, Twitch, SoundCloud, …). Built on youtube-helper + ffmpeg + feedparser + podcastparser; Shannon-correct resampling, mono downmix or native channels preserved.
